metadata.description: Personal marketplace bundling skills for doctoral qualitative education research: literature review, citation verification, section writing, qualitative academic writing, qualitative findings analysis, research methodology design, supervisor-style review, anti-AI prose cleanup, self-review, and reviewer-response drafting.

plugins.name: research-writing-toolkit
plugins.description: Ten skills for doctoral qualitative education research, refactored from a general scientific-writing bundle to support a study of Australian secondary teachers' experiences of using generative AI to differentiate for diverse learners.
